div.p: The third and fourth reports of the United Nations Representative for India and Pakistan (UN docs. S/2611 and S/2783, dated April 22 and May 29, 1952, respectively) were considered by the Security Council at its 605th to 611th meetings on October 10, November 5, and December 5, 8, 16, and 23, 1952 (UN docs. S/PV. 605–611).
